terminology.Digest Renderer: S5 pure transform render(items: list[SummarizedItem], *, lookback_days: int) -> str producing Markdown
terminology.DigestRenderer (port): New role-named Protocol in osspulse.ports; single render() method; concrete adapter MarkdownDigestRenderer in src/osspulse/render/
terminology.Pure transform: No file/network/LLM/state I/O, no upstream imports; output = f(input)
terminology.Khác bucket: Trailing '### Khác (N)' group for unknown item_type (__other__ key) — no item ever dropped
terminology.No-new-items doc: Non-empty Markdown returned for empty input (# OSS Pulse Digest + 'No new items in the last N days')
terminology.GROUP_ORDER: Module constant ['issue','discussion','release'] fixing group emission order; Khác trails
terminology.dict-of-dict grouping: dict[repo]->dict[group_key]->list determinism strategy; insertion order; NO set
terminology.MarkdownDigestRenderer: Concrete adapter implementing DigestRenderer; render() delegates to the pure free render() function
